MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James W. Johnston by telephonic appearence, for plaintiff and moving party: John A. Johnston
Holly A. Schaitberger for defendant and opposing party: Orion Bus Industries
Laura S. Flynn for defendant and opposing party: Transit Care

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff John Johnston's motion to quash subpoenas is denied. However, the Court will modify the subpoenas to only require production of plaintiff's medical and billing records from January 1, 2000 to the present relating to conditions of the shoulders, feet, hips, and back. Production of the records shall take place on or before August 25, 2006. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2006 Set For Trial On Sep-05-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-21-06 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 318
